title: BIOBROWN Medium Gift Boxes with Lids for Presents, 22 x 22 x 22 cm White Collapsible Gift Box for Valentine's Day, Birthday, Wedding, Baby Shower, Party, Any Occasion
features: Size: The birthday gift box with lid measures 22cm long, 22cm wide and 22cm high. Perfect size for gifting jewelry, shirts, scarves, dolls, mugs, photo frame, candies, and wrapped treats to your loved ones

Premium Quality: The nice holiday gift box is made of high-quality paper. Easy folding side and lids enclosures ensure secure fit. The sturdy cardboard is durable enough to hold a variety of items and can be mailed and reused

Package: Including 1 pcs gift box with lid, 2 gift cards, 3 pcs white tissue paper, 2 adhesive dots and a decor gift bow. The box set adopts neat shrink film for wrapping overall pieces to prevent scratches and reduce dust. The packages are shipped flat and you can assemble it easily

All Occasion: These gift boxes are perfect for Holidays, Birthdays to add a splash of color to all of your gifts. Also great for Valentine's Day, Parties, Baby Showers, Weddings, Events, and any of your other seasonal gifting needs
Exquisite Gift Box: The decorative box would make a great addition to any decor. It can be used to store your memorable gifts and as a daily gift box, documents gift box, CD/DVD container, etc
